---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't behaving the way it should
labels: bug
---

## SSCCE

A **Short, Self-Contained, Correct (Compilable) Example** — the smallest bit
of code that still reproduces the bug, with nothing to install or assume.
Paste it as a single block; we should be able to copy it, run it, and see the
bug with zero edits.

```ts
// paste your minimal repro here
```

## Expected

What you expected it to do.

## Actual

What it actually did.

## Version

- `@dunky-dev/*` version:
